title: Yishu Shen   Alec
text:
Email
  
  
    
     Google Scholar
  
  
    
     GitHub
  

  
  


Hi! I am an incoming Ph.D. student in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) at The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST) for Fall 2026, where I will be supervised by Prof. Yinghao Xu. Currently, I am working as a research intern at Ant Group. I am pursuing and will receive my Bachelor of Engineering in Industrial Design (Mechanical) from Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU).
In Fall 2025, I was an exchange student in CSE at HKUST, where I also served as a visiting student in the HKUST Aerial Robotics Group. During my undergraduate studies at SJTU, I worked as a research intern at the Global Institute of Future Technology, under the supervision of Prof. Tong Qin. Prior to this, I worked as a research intern at the College of Computer Science and Technology, Zhejiang University, supervised by Prof. Lingyun Sun and Prof. Liuqing Chen, and at the School of Oceanography, SJTU, supervised by Prof. Zheng Zeng.
My research focuses on deploying intelligent systems in the physical world, with a particular emphasis on developing scalable data acquisition paradigms to facilitate generalizable dexterous manipulation in unstructured environments.

Direct, Targetless and Automatic Joint Calibration of LiDAR-Camera Intrinsic and Extrinsic  Yishu Shen, Sheng Hong, Shaojie Shen, Tong Qin  IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2025.  [Paper] [Code]









Nezha-MB: Design and implementation of a Morphing Hybrid Aerial-Underwater vehicle  Zhuxiu Xu*, Yishu Shen*, Yuanbo Bi, Baichuan Zeng, Zheng Zeng   (* denotes equal contribution)  IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2025.  [Paper]









GS-LIVO: Real-Time LiDAR, Inertial, and Visual Multi-sensor Fused Odometry with Gaussian Mapping  Sheng Hong, Chunran Zheng, Yishu Shen, Changze Li, Fu Zhang, Tong Qin, Shaojie Shen  IEEE Transactions on Robotics (TRO), 2025. [Paper]









Design and Implementation of a Bone-shaped Hybrid Aerial Underwater Vehicle  Yuanbo Bi, Zhuxiu Xu, Yishu Shen, Zheng Zeng, Lian Lian  IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL), 2024. (Presented at IROS, 2025)  [Paper]









CoRemix: Supporting Online Learning in Scratch Community with Visual Flowchart and Generative AI  Yunnong Chen, Xinyu Yu, Yishu Shen, Ruiyi Liu, Lingyun Sun, Liuqing Chen  International Journal of Human–Computer Interaction (IJHCI), 2025.  [Paper]
